content:
🌟 chirp | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Demonstrating and experimenting with data transmission using audible sound frequencies.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time frequency visualization of audio input • Send messages by converting text to sound • Receive messages by listening to sound and decoding it back to text • Distinctive start and end signatures to mark transmissions
📖 Summary: Chirp is a TypeScript application that enables data transfer through sound. It encodes text into audio frequencies for transmission via speakers and decodes received audio back into text, featuring real-time frequency visualization.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
